url.description: The URL of the GeoZarr source.

bands.description: Named band identifiers to load from the Zarr store (e.g. ["b04", "b03", "b02"]). When omitted, all bands are loaded in their stored order.

useProxy.description: Route requests through the Jupyter server proxy to avoid CORS issues.

httpHeaders.description: HTTP headers forwarded to the upstream server when useProxy is true.
